jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rivigo - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Rivigo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
